name: WorkBuddy
setup: Create a custom agent or workspace assistant using setup-guide.md.
Convert skill sections into WorkBuddy workflow steps or reusable prompts.
Confirm whether the workspace has file access, search, command execution, and edit permissions before enabling codebase tasks.
notes: WorkBuddy support is modeled conservatively because platform capabilities can vary by deployment.
Treat file search, shell execution, Git inspection, and patch editing as degraded until confirmed in the target workspace.
Run smoke tests after setup to identify hidden platform gaps.
